tasks.label: Deploy: Release DLL
args: $dest = 'D:/G_games/steam/steamapps/common/Slay the Spire 2/mods/STS2_Discard_Mod'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'src/bin/Release/net9.0/STS2DiscardMod.dll' -Destination $dest -Force -Verbose; if (Test-Path 'src/bin/Release/net9.0/0Harmony.dll') { Copy-Item -Path 'src/bin/Release/net9.0/0Harmony.dll' -Destination $dest -Force -Verbose; } if (Test-Path 'src/bin/Release/net9.0/STS2DiscardMod.pck') { Copy-Item -Path 'src/bin/Release/net9.0/STS2DiscardMod.pck' -Destination $dest -Force -Verbose; } else { Write-Warning 'STS2DiscardMod.pck not found. Configure GODOT_CLI_COMMAND before building to export card portrait resources.' }; Write-Host '✅ Release runtime deployed to mods/STS2_Discard_Mod/' -ForegroundColor Green

tasks.label: Deploy: Debug DLL + PDB
args: $dest = 'D:/G_games/steam/steamapps/common/Slay the Spire 2/mods/STS2_Discard_Mod'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'src/bin/Debug/net9.0/STS2DiscardMod.dll' -Destination $dest -Force -Verbose; Copy-Item -Path 'src/bin/Debug/net9.0/STS2DiscardMod.pdb' -Destination $dest -Force -Verbose; if (Test-Path 'src/bin/Debug/net9.0/0Harmony.dll') { Copy-Item -Path 'src/bin/Debug/net9.0/0Harmony.dll' -Destination $dest -Force -Verbose; } if (Test-Path 'src/bin/Debug/net9.0/STS2DiscardMod.pck') { Copy-Item -Path 'src/bin/Debug/net9.0/STS2DiscardMod.pck' -Destination $dest -Force -Verbose; } else { Write-Warning 'STS2DiscardMod.pck not found. Configure GODOT_CLI_COMMAND before building to export card portrait resources.' }; Write-Host '✅ Debug runtime deployed to mods/STS2_Discard_Mod/' -ForegroundColor Green

tasks.label: Deploy: STS2_Discard_Mod.json
args: $dest = 'D:/G_games/steam/steamapps/common/Slay the Spire 2/mods/STS2_Discard_Mod'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'STS2_Discard_Mod.json' -Destination $dest -Force -Verbose; Write-Host '✅ STS2_Discard_Mod.json deployed to mods/STS2_Discard_Mod/' -ForegroundColor Green

tasks.label: Attach Debugger: Godot
args:
Write-Host '💡 Launching VS Code debugger...
Steps:
1. Click Debug → Attach to Process
2. Search for: Godot.exe
3. Click Attach

⏳ This will give you breakpoint debugging support!' -ForegroundColor Cyan
